headline: Seagate Settlement Over Huawei Sales Reframes Risks For Soaring Stock Narrative
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings agreed to a $175 million settlement over claims it failed to disclose more than $1.1 billion in hard drive sales to Huawei that allegedly breached U.S. export controls. The settlement follows an earlier record penalty and addresses allegations that Seagate’s profits and share price were supported by undisclosed sales to the blacklisted Chinese telecoms group. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:STX, this settlement is a significant development for a stock currently...

headline: Space Florida to fund ocean-based space launch company, other secretive projects
summary: Space Florida continues to hold things close to the vest with several ongoing projects as it tries to attract aerospace business to the state — but did reveal the company behind what they had dubbed “Project Manta” to be Seagate Space, for which the state agency will help fund an offshore launch platform. The state’s aerospace finance and development authority held a Board of Directors meeting ...
